data.name: AlterIdentityColumn
data.value: Changing the value of an identity column is not supported.

data.name: DuplicateColumnNameValueGenerationStrategyMismatch
data.value: '{entityType1}.{property1}' and '{entityType2}.{property2}' are both mapped to column '{columnName}' in '{table}' but are configured with different value generation strategies.

data.name: FunctionOnClient
data.value: The '{methodName}' method is not supported because the query has switched to client-evaluation. Inspect the log to determine which query expressions are triggering client-evaluation.

data.name: IdentityBadType
data.value: Identity value generation cannot be used for the property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' because the property type is '{propertyType}'. Identity value generation can only be used with signed integer properties.

data.name: IndexTableRequired
data.value: Index '{index}' on entity type '{entityType}' requires a mapped table.

data.name: InvalidColumnNameForFreeText
data.value: The FreeText method does not support columns of type '{dataType}'.

data.name: InvalidTableToIncludeInScaffolding
data.value: The specified table '{table}' is not valid. Specify tables using the format '[schema].[table]'.

data.name: MultipleIdentityColumns
data.value: Cannot use table '{table}' for entity type because its primary key includes multiple identity columns: {properties}.

data.name: NonKeyValueGeneration
data.value: The property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' is configured to use 'SequenceHiLo' value generator, which is only intended for keys. If this was intentional configure an alternate key on the property, otherwise call 'ValueGeneratedNever' or configure store generation for this property.

data.name: NoUserId
data.value: A user ID must be specified in the connection string.

data.name: SequenceBadType
data.value: DM sequences cannot be used to generate values for the property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' because the property type is '{propertyType}'. Sequences can only be used with integer properties.

data.name: TransientExceptionDetected
data.value: An exception has been raised that is likely due to a transient failure. Consider enabling transient error resiliency by adding 'EnableRetryOnFailure()' to the 'UseDm' call.

data.name: UnqualifiedDataType
data.value: The data type '{dataType}' used for a column is not fully qualified. Explicitly set the data type to something like 'varchar(100)', 'decimal(5, 2)', 'int', etc.

data.name: UnqualifiedDataTypeOnProperty
data.value: The data type '{dataType}' used for property '{property}' is not fully qualified. Explicitly set the data type to something like 'varchar(100)', 'decimal(5, 2)', 'int', etc.

data.name: LogByteIdentityColumn
data.value: The property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' is of type 'byte', but is configured to use a DM identity column. This requires that values starting at 255 and counting downward will be used for seeding. Make sure that your seed data does not contain negative values and that no other columns in the table use such values, otherwise the database may reject the values and the model may become inconsistent.

data.name: LogConflictingValueGenerationStrategies
data.value: The property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' is configured with conflicting value generation strategies ('{strategy1}' and '{strategy2}'). Only one value generation strategy can be applied at a time.

data.name: LogDefaultDecimalTypeColumn
data.value: No type was specified for the decimal column '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}'. This will cause values to be silently truncated if they do not fit in the default precision and scale. Explicitly specify the DM column type that can accommodate all the values in 'OnModelCreating' using 'HasColumnType', specify precision and scale using 'HasPrecision', or configure a value converter using 'HasConversion'.

data.name: LogFoundColumn
data.value: Found column with table: {tableName}, column name: {columnName}, data type: {dataType}, nullable: {isNullable}, identity: {isIdentity}, default value: {defaultValue}, computed value: {computedValue}.
data.comment: Debug DmEventId.ColumnFound string string string bool bool string string

data.name: LogFoundDefaultSchema
data.value: Found default schema: {defaultSchema}.

data.name: LogFoundForeignKey
data.value: Found foreign key on table: {tableName}, name: {foreignKeyName}, principal table: {principalTableName}, delete action: {deleteAction}.
data.comment: Debug DmEventId.ForeignKeyFound string string string string

data.name: LogFoundIndex
data.value: Found index with name: {indexName}, table: {tableName}, is unique: {isUnique}.

data.name: LogFoundPrimaryKey
data.value: Found primary key with name: {primaryKeyName}, table: {tableName}.

data.name: LogFoundSequence
data.value: Found sequence name: {name}, data type: {dataType}, cyclic: {isCyclic}, increment: {increment}, start: {start}, minimum: {min}, maximum: {max}.
data.comment: Debug DmEventId.SequenceFound string string bool int long long long

data.name: LogFoundTable
data.value: Found table with name: {name}.

data.name: LogFoundUniqueConstraint
data.value: Found unique constraint with name: {uniqueConstraintName}, table: {tableName}.

data.name: LogMissingSchema
data.value: Unable to find a schema in the database matching the selected schema {schema}.

data.name: LogMissingTable
data.value: Unable to find a table in the database matching the selected table {table}.

data.name: LogPrincipalColumnNotFound
data.value: For foreign key {foreignKeyName} on table {tableName}, unable to find the column called {principalColumnName} on the foreign key's principal table, {principalTableName}. Skipping foreign key.

data.name: LogPrincipalTableNotInSelectionSet
data.value: For foreign key {fkName} on table {tableName}, unable to model the end of the foreign key on principal table {principalTableName}. This is usually because the principal table was not included in the selection set.
